final_sql:
WITH "session_base" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    t."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    t."visitId" AS "visitId",
    t."totals":"transactions"::INTEGER AS "transactions",
    t."totals":"pageviews"::INTEGER AS "pageviews",
    t."hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t
  WHERE t."date" >= '20170401'
    AND t."date" < '20170801'
),
"session_product_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    sb."fullVisitorId",
    sb."visitId",
    MAX(p.value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER) AS "productRevenue"
  FROM "session_base" AS sb,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => sb."hits") AS h,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.value:"product") AS p
  GROUP BY
    sb."fullVisitorId",
    sb."visitId"
),
"classified_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    sb."month",
    sb."fullVisitorId",
    sb."pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN sb."transactions" >= 1 AND spr."productRevenue" IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN sb."transactions" IS NULL AND spr."productRevenue" IS NULL THEN 'non_purchase'
    END AS "purchase_status"
  FROM "session_base" AS sb
  LEFT JOIN "session_product_revenue" AS spr
    ON sb."fullVisitorId" = spr."fullVisitorId"
   AND sb."visitId" = spr."visitId"
  WHERE
    (sb."transactions" >= 1 AND spr."productRevenue" IS NOT NULL)
    OR (sb."transactions" IS NULL AND spr."productRevenue" IS NULL)
),
"visitor_month_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    cs."month",
    cs."purchase_status",
    cs."fullVisitorId",
    SUM(cs."pageviews") AS "visitor_pageviews"
  FROM "classified_sessions" AS cs
  GROUP BY
    cs."month",
    cs."purchase_status",
    cs."fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  vmp."month",
  vmp."purchase_status",
  AVG(vmp."visitor_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "visitor_month_pageviews" AS vmp
GROUP BY
  vmp."month",
  vmp."purchase_status"
ORDER BY
  vmp."month",
  vmp."purchase_status"

final_sql:
WITH "base_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    t."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    t."totals":"pageviews"::INTEGER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(t."totals":"transactions"::INTEGER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "purchase_classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t
  WHERE t."date" >= '20170601'
    AND t."date" < '20170801'
    AND t."totals":"pageviews"::INTEGER IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170801', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    t."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    t."totals":"pageviews"::INTEGER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(t."totals":"transactions"::INTEGER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "purchase_classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170801 AS t
  WHERE '20170801' >= '20170601'
    AND '20170801' < '20170801'
    AND t."totals":"pageviews"::INTEGER IS NOT NULL
),
"visitor_month_classification_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    "base_sessions"."month",
    "base_sessions"."fullVisitorId",
    "base_sessions"."purchase_classification",
    SUM("base_sessions"."pageviews") AS "visitor_total_pageviews"
  FROM "base_sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "base_sessions"."month",
    "base_sessions"."fullVisitorId",
    "base_sessions"."purchase_classification"
),
"monthly_classification_averages" AS (
  SELECT
    "visitor_month_classification_pageviews"."month",
    "visitor_month_classification_pageviews"."purchase_classification",
    AVG("visitor_month_classification_pageviews"."visitor_total_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_month_classification_pageviews"
  GROUP BY
    "visitor_month_classification_pageviews"."month",
    "visitor_month_classification_pageviews"."purchase_classification"
)
SELECT
  "monthly_classification_averages"."month",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "monthly_classification_averages"."purchase_classification" = 'purchase' THEN "monthly_classification_averages"."avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "monthly_classification_averages"."purchase_classification" = 'non_purchase' THEN "monthly_classification_averages"."avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "monthly_classification_averages"
GROUP BY "monthly_classification_averages"."month"
ORDER BY "monthly_classification_averages"."month" ASC

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    t."fullVisitorId",
    t."visitId",
    t."visitNumber",
    t."visitStartTime",
    t."date",
    t."totals":"newVisits"::INTEGER AS "newVisits",
    t."totals":"timeOnSite"::INTEGER AS "timeOnSite",
    t."totals":"transactions"::INTEGER AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170801 AS t
  WHERE t."date" >= '20160801'
    AND t."date" < '20170801'
),
"initial_new_users" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitStartTime",
    s."timeOnSite"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  WHERE s."visitNumber" = 1
    AND s."newVisits" = 1
    AND s."date" >= '20160801'
    AND s."date" < '20170501'
),
"qualified_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "initial_new_users" AS i
  INNER JOIN "all_sessions" AS s
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = i."fullVisitorId"
   AND s."visitNumber" > 1
   AND s."visitStartTime" > i."visitStartTime"
  WHERE i."timeOnSite" > 300
    AND COALESCE(s."transactions", 0) > 0
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT q."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage"
FROM "initial_new_users" AS i
LEFT JOIN "qualified_users" AS q
  ON i."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId";

WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "p"."application_number",
    "p"."filing_date",
    UPPER(TRIM("ah".value:"name"::STRING)) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "p"."assignee_harmonized") AS "ah",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "p"."cpc") AS "cpc"
  WHERE "p"."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND UPPER(TRIM("ah".value:"name"::STRING)) IS NOT NULL
    AND "cpc".value:"code"::STRING ILIKE 'A61%'
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") DESC, "assignee_name" ASC
  ) = 1
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR("ap"."filing_date" / 10000) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "ap"."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS "ap"
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS "ta"
    ON "ap"."assignee_name" = "ta"."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY FLOOR("ap"."filing_date" / 10000)
)
SELECT
  "filing_year"
FROM "assignee_year_counts"
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "filing_year" ASC
) = 1

WITH "months" AS (
    SELECT DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), TO_DATE('2008-01-01')) AS "month_start"
    FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_us_publications_by_month" AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(p."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_month",
        COUNT(DISTINCT p."publication_number") AS "publication_count"
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => p."abstract_localized") AS abs
    WHERE p."publication_number" ILIKE 'US-%'
      AND p."filing_date" >= 20080101
      AND p."filing_date" <= 20221231
      AND abs.value:"language"::STRING = 'en'
      AND abs.value:"text"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(p."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
"months_with_counts" AS (
    SELECT
        m."month_start",
        COALESCE(i."publication_count", 0) AS "publication_count"
    FROM "months" AS m
    LEFT JOIN "iot_us_publications_by_month" AS i
      ON m."month_start" = i."filing_month"
)
SELECT
    "month_start",
    "publication_count"
FROM "months_with_counts"
ORDER BY "month_start" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "focal_patents" AS (
    SELECT
        p."application_number",
        p."publication_number",
        p."filing_date"
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
    WHERE p."application_kind" = 'A'
      AND p."grant_date" >= 20100101
      AND p."grant_date" <= 20101231
    GROUP BY
        p."application_number",
        p."publication_number",
        p."filing_date"
),
"forward_citation_counts" AS (
    SELECT
        fp."application_number",
        fp."publication_number",
        fp."filing_date",
        COUNT(DISTINCT p."application_number") AS "distinct_forward_citing_applications"
    FROM "focal_patents" AS fp
    JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
        ON TRUE
    , LATERAL FLATTEN(input => p."citation") AS c
    WHERE fp."publication_number" = c.value:"publication_number"::STRING
      AND p."filing_date" >= fp."filing_date"
      AND p."filing_date" <= fp."filing_date" + 100000
    GROUP BY
        fp."application_number",
        fp."publication_number",
        fp."filing_date"
),
"patents_with_one_forward_citation" AS (
    SELECT
        fcc."application_number"
    FROM "forward_citation_counts" AS fcc
    WHERE fcc."distinct_forward_citing_applications" = 1
    GROUP BY
        fcc."application_number"
)
SELECT
    COUNT(pw."application_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "patents_with_one_forward_citation" AS pw

WITH "family_application_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    t1."family_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT t1."application_number") AS "distinct_application_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  WHERE t1."family_id" != '-1'
    AND t1."application_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t1."family_id"
),
"multi_application_families" AS (
  SELECT
    fac."family_id",
    fac."distinct_application_count"
  FROM "family_application_counts" AS fac
  WHERE fac."distinct_application_count" > 1
),
"eligible_cn_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    t1.*
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  INNER JOIN "multi_application_families" AS maf
    ON t1."family_id" = maf."family_id"
  WHERE t1."publication_number" ILIKE 'CN%'
    AND t1."grant_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND t1."grant_date" >= 20100101
    AND t1."grant_date" <= 20231231
)
SELECT
  COUNT("application_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "eligible_cn_patents"

WITH "filtered_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    i.value:"code"::STRING AS "ipc_code"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."ipc") AS i
  WHERE t."country_code" = 'US'
    AND t."kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND t."application_kind" = 'A'
    AND t."grant_date" >= 20220601
    AND t."grant_date" <= 20220831
),
"ipc_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTRING("ipc_code", 1, 4) AS "ipc_4digit",
    COUNT(*) AS "patent_count"
  FROM "filtered_patents"
  GROUP BY SUBSTRING("ipc_code", 1, 4)
)
SELECT
  "ipc_4digit",
  "patent_count"
FROM "ipc_counts"
ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "ipc_4digit" ASC
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "filtered_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number",
    t."ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t
  WHERE t."country_code" = 'US'
    AND t."kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND t."publication_date" >= 20220601
    AND t."publication_date" <= 20220930
),
"publication_ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    fp."publication_number",
    SUBSTRING(ipc_f.value:"code"::STRING, 1, 4) AS "ipc4_code"
  FROM "filtered_publications" AS fp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => fp."ipc") AS ipc_f
  WHERE ipc_f.value:"code"::STRING IS NOT NULL
),
"ipc4_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    pic."publication_number",
    pic."ipc4_code",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_frequency"
  FROM "publication_ipc_codes" AS pic
  GROUP BY
    pic."publication_number",
    pic."ipc4_code"
),
"ranked_ipc4" AS (
  SELECT
    ic."publication_number",
    ic."ipc4_code",
    ic."ipc4_frequency",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY ic."publication_number"
      ORDER BY ic."ipc4_frequency" DESC, ic."ipc4_code" ASC
    ) AS "ipc4_rank"
  FROM "ipc4_counts" AS ic
),
"top_ipc4_per_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    r."publication_number",
    r."ipc4_code",
    r."ipc4_frequency"
  FROM "ranked_ipc4" AS r
  WHERE r."ipc4_rank" = 1
),
"qualified_top_ipc4" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number",
    t."ipc4_code"
  FROM "top_ipc4_per_patent" AS t
  WHERE t."ipc4_frequency" >= 10
)
SELECT
  q."publication_number",
  q."ipc4_code"
FROM "qualified_top_ipc4" AS q
ORDER BY q."publication_number" ASC, q."ipc4_code" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "base_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number",
    t."filing_date",
    t."grant_date"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS t
  WHERE t."country_code" = 'US'
    AND t."kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND t."grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20141231
),
"forward_citations_within_month" AS (
  SELECT
    bp."publication_number",
    COUNT(DISTINCT cb.value:"publication_number"::STRING) AS "forward_citation_count_within_1m"
  FROM "base_patents" AS bp
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON bp."publication_number" = a."publication_number"
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(input => a."cited_by") AS cb
  WHERE bp."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND cb.value:"filing_date"::NUMBER IS NOT NULL
    AND cb.value:"filing_date"::NUMBER >= bp."filing_date"
    AND cb.value:"filing_date"::NUMBER <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, TO_DATE(bp."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD'))
  GROUP BY bp."publication_number"
),
"ranked_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    bp."publication_number",
    COALESCE(fc."forward_citation_count_within_1m", 0) AS "forward_citation_count_within_1m"
  FROM "base_patents" AS bp
  LEFT JOIN "forward_citations_within_month" AS fc
    ON bp."publication_number" = fc."publication_number"
)
SELECT
  "publication_number"
FROM "ranked_patents"
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY "forward_citation_count_within_1m" DESC, "publication_number" ASC
) = 1
